description: A few days after an order is delivered, an automated system should ask the customer for feedback on their experience.

nodes.task_description: Identify orders that were marked as 'Delivered' 3-5 days ago.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a list of recent, completed orders.

nodes.task_description: For each order, send a personalized email asking the customer to rate their experience and review the products they purchased.

expected_outcome.expected: System successfully sends out feedback request emails.
